name: codex-science
description: Codex-native science workflow orchestrator with life-sciences skills, MCP connector catalog, and research-to-execution routing.

interface.shortDescription: Research strategy, literature, clinical, and omics workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Science replicates the Claude Science life-sciences workflow as a Codex-native orchestration skill package. It routes scientific requests across research ideation, literature evidence, clinical protocols, single-cell analysis, nf-core pipelines, scvi-tools modeling, and instrument data standardization, while documenting optional MCP connectors and authentication needs.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Science to evaluate this research idea
Use Codex Science to plan an OMIX or single-cell analysis
Use Codex Science to draft a clinical study protocol
